description: 166 - 02-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Ailsa Terry (Private Secretary for Foreign Affairs, No 10) and others
text:
Secretary for Foreign Affairs, No 10) and others

From: Peter Mandelson Personal

Sent: Wed 02/04/2025 9:39:48 PM (UTC)

To: Morgan McSweeney Personal ; Oliver
Robbins Personal ; Caroline
Hurndall Personal ; Varun
Chandra Personal Ailsa Terry (No.10) Personal
Mungo Woodifield Personal James
Roscoe Personal
Subject: Re: quick response

It is not a good al

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Ailsa Terry

Sent: Wednesday, April 2, 2025 5:38:30 PM

To: Peter Mandelson ; Morgan McSweeney ; Oliver Robbins ; Caroline Hurndall ; Varun Chandra
Subject: RE: quick response

Thanks Peter also to your team for their hard work — agreement from this end and
ee Lowest in the G7 is a good

line to play in.

| have asked for analysis of what this means globally, as many countries much

harder hit than they may have been expecting with security implications too.

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: 02 April 2025 22:01
To: Morgan McSweeney : Ailsa Terry ; Oliver Robbins ; Caroline Hurndall ; Varun Chandra
Subject: quick response —_ QF FICIAL-SENSITIVE

At a 10% baseline reciprocal tariff — the lowest of any G7 country - the UK has won
recognition of its fair and balanced trade relationship with the US.

Lord Mandelson

HM Ambassador, Washington DC
Personal | Personal

479
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
